subject: [AAI] OOM AAI resources healthcheck based on Cassandra DB Healthcheck
commit_message:
[AAI] OOM AAI resources healthcheck based on Cassandra DB Healthcheck

Use echo endpoint for aai-resources liveness and readiness probes
Updated aai resources docker image

Issue-ID: AAI-3528
Signed-off-by: Rommel Pawar <rommel.pawar@bell.ca>
Change-Id: I2ceb489142063189d39ec271d3ea82e00e781b75

I guess we need for that new AAI image first?

Patch Set 1:

your java code updates for healthcheck will not be in this gating pass since the new docker has not been released and updated in oom, if these updates alone do what you need, then ok, but if you require your java updates, they are not there yet

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

wait for new image
